Class BedrockAwsConnectionProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.bedrock.autoconfigure.BedrockAwsConnectionProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.bedrock.aws") public class BedrockAwsConnectionProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for Bedrock AWS connection.
Since:
0.8.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Baojun Jiang
